# Dealix CRM Pipeline

## Stages
1. New Account
2. Research Complete
3. Fit Scored
4. Outreach Drafted
5. Contacted
6. Replied
7. Discovery Booked
8. Diagnostic Delivered
9. Proposal Sent
10. Negotiation
11. Won
12. Lost
13. Nurture

## Required Fields
- Company Name
- Sector
- City
- Website
- Public Contact Source
- Contact Name
- Contact Role
- Pain Hypothesis
- Offer Fit
- Lead Score
- Last Touch Date
- Next Action
- Consent/Legitimate Context Notes
- Owner
- Stage

## Scoring
- Pain clarity: 0–25
- Revenue relevance: 0–25
- Contactability: 0–20
- Sector fit: 0–15
- Urgency signal: 0–15

90–100 = priority call
70–89 = personalized outreach
50–69 = nurture
below 50 = ignore until signal improves
